languages.text: "О каких грехах вы говорите? За что Императору карать Гордость Сантиэля?"

traits.locale_text: "О каких грехах вы говорите? За что Императору карать Гордость Сантиэля?"

languages.text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"
languages.original_text: "О каких грехах вы говорите? За что Императору карать Гордость Сантиэля?"

traits.locale_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"
"What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"
"What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: "Von welchen Übertretungen sprichst du? Warum sollte der Kaiser Santiels Stolz bestrafen?"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: "De quelles transgressions parlez-vous ? Pourquoi l'Empereur punirait-il l'orgueil de Santiel ?"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: "你说的是什么过失？为什么皇帝要惩罚桑提尔的骄傲？"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: "¿De qué transgresiones estás hablando? ¿Por qué el Emperador castigaría el orgullo de Santiel?"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: 「どんな罪のことですか？なぜ皇帝がサンティエルのプライドを罰するのか？"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"

languages.text: "Hangi günahlardan bahsediyorsun? İmparator Santiel'in gururunu neden cezalandırsın ki?"
languages.original_text: "What transgressions are your talking about? Why would the Emperor punish Santiel's pride?"
